mapper.select: SELECT user_code AS userCode, employee_no AS employeeNo, name AS name, created_at AS createdAt, last_login_at AS lastLoginAt FROM users WHERE user_code = #{userCode}

SELECT /* ✅ 내가 등록한 일감(created_by_code = userCode) */ NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB1' AND i.created_by_code = #{userCode} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS regNewIss, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB2' AND i.created_by_code = #{userCode} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS regProgress, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB3' AND i.created_by_code = #{userCode} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS regSolution, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB4' AND i.created_by_code = #{userCode} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS regReturnIss, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB5' AND i.created_by_code = #{userCode} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS regCompletion,
/* ✅ 내가 담당자인 일감(assignee_code = userCode) */ NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB1' AND i.assignee_code = #{userCode} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS assNewIss, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB2' AND i.assignee_code = #{userCode} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS assProgress, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB3' AND i.assignee_code = #{userCode} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS assSolution, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB4' AND i.assignee_code = #{userCode} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS assReturnIss, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB5' AND i.assignee_code = #{userCode} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS assCompletion
FROM projects p
JOIN ( SELECT pru.project_code FROM project_role_user pru WHERE pru.user_code = #{userCode}
UNION
SELECT gpr.project_code FROM "GROUP_MEMBER" gm JOIN "GR_PRO_ROLE" gpr ON gpr.gr_code = gm.gr_code WHERE gm.user_code = #{userCode} ) up ON up.project_code = p.project_code
LEFT JOIN issues i ON i.project_code = p.project_code
LEFT JOIN status s ON s.status_code = i.status_code
WHERE p.status = 'OD1'
